steps.assistant_text: func_800081D0 is the no-prologue mid-function continuation (second half) of __rmonClearBreak (func_8000817C). Compiled the FULL function body in kernel_040.c (both blocks, single instr_a local coalesces the two BREAK-test spill slots to 0x1C(sp)); extended TRUNCATE_TEXT 0x100->0x194 to keep the continuation; exposed the mid-function entry as section-relative linker symbol func_800081D0 = func_8000817C + 0x54. Removed the INCLUDE_ASM fragment from kernel_020_c.c and the orphan .s. All 37 continuation words byte-exact; full ROM cmp-clean vs baserom.

metadata.verification: make clean && make produces a byte-identical ROM (cmp clean vs baserom); 37/37 words at 0x800081D0-0x80008264 match the original asm target.
